case_title: C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR VS. SHU FUN CHU

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, SHU FUN $2,838.61 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,884.55, ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT STAYED FOR 60 DAYS FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT TO ALLOW PARTIES TO DISCUSS INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT OR FOR DEFENDANT TO FILE MOTION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIMS DEFENDANT MAY HAVE AGAINST THIRD PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
